documentation.value: Prints a value to standard output without a trailing newline.
The value to print. Supports various types through overloading.
Prints a value to standard output followed by a newline character.
The value to print followed by a newline.
Declares an immutable value binding. The pattern on the left is matched against the expression on the right.
The name (or pattern) to bind.
The expression whose value is bound to the name.
Defines a function. Supports pattern matching, mutual recursion (with 'and'), and type annotations.
The function name.
The function parameters with optional type annotations.
The return type of the function.
The function body expression.
Provides the implementation for a previously declared function template.
The name of the function to implement.
The function arguments.
The implementation body.
Declares an external function from C or another language for use in ATS.
The ATS name for the external function.
Parameter types.
The return type.
The C function name string.
Statically loads a file and brings its declarations into scope. Required for accessing types and functions.
The .sats or .hats file to load.
Dynamically loads a file to ensure its top-level definitions are initialized at runtime.
The .dats file to dynamically load.
